operation_scope: AEM-EVOLVE multi-agent governance orchestration — controlled environment — EthicBit / CEMU v3.7.0+
raw_cot_prohibition_note: Raw chain-of-thought capture is prohibited per AI-ME-05 specification. Rationale summary and planning metadata are used instead.

rationale_summary.goal: Execute Mechanical Ethics Assurance governance pass for AEM-EVOLVE v3.1 AI-ME gate suite
sub_goals: Verify each of 12 AI-ME gates against declared acceptance criteria
Produce hash-verifiable evidence artifacts for each gate
Aggregate gate outcomes under constitutional governance rules
Enforce fail-closed rule: artifact_assurance_required + not verified => FAIL_CLOSED
Enforce anti-upgrade rule: Fast Path PASS cannot upgrade failed gate
rationale_summary.plan_selected: Sequential gate verification with AEM v1.1 artifact assurance per gate, followed by deterministic aggregation
rationale_summary.decision_rationale: Constitutional compliance requires evidence-before-claims; aggregation rules are non-negotiable

decision_trace.decision: Create evidence artifacts for all 12 gates
Compute SHA256 hashes for AEM v1.1 verification
Run gate verifiers — apply fail_closed rule per gate

known_limitations: Trace covers governance execution only — not underlying LLM inference traces
No real-time agent tracing infrastructure — trace is constructed from deterministic execution record
